referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Full-width split hero with copy weighted left and doctor/patient image right, with soft blue-tinted overlays and lightweight top navigation.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Large modern sans headline with compact line-height and straightforward supporting paragraph beneath the primary CTA pair.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: Four compact trust/stat cards immediately below hero, each in rounded white tiles with subtle elevation.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Centered 3x2 icon card grid with brief service descriptions and restrained card chrome.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Two-column doctor feature section in a tinted background lane with profile image paired to bio-led content.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Three equal-width testimonial cards with star row, quote text, and author attribution.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Soft-blue hero -> white stats -> white trust/services -> tinted doctor panel -> white testimonials -> light CTA band -> white contact -> dark footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Balanced and readable spacing: generous enough to feel calm, but denser than editorial luxury layouts.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded pill actions with solid primary gradient fill and outlined/soft ghost secondary treatment.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Navy-blue drives headings and actions while aqua accent appears in icon halos and highlights; body stays mostly white and pale blue.
